allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'claude|cc|deepseek' } | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'claude|cc|deepseek' } | Select-Object Name)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'cc|switch|claude' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle)

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match '^\(claude|cc-switch|CCXProcess\)$' } | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force; Write-Output "已终止: $\($_.ProcessName\) \(PID $\($_.Id\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "无法终止: $\($_.ProcessName\) \(PID $\($_.Id\)\): $_" } })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "claude" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { if \($_.MainWindowTitle -ne ""\) { Write-Output "Closing: PID=$\($_.Id\) Title=$\($_.MainWindowTitle\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Write-Output "Done closing Claude Desktop windows")

PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AppData\\Local\\Programs" -Directory | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\WindowsApps" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'claude|anthropic' } | Select-Object FullName)
